name: Elliott Dock
description_short: Elliott Dock is a pawn shop in Indianapolis offering collateral-based loans and merchandise sales. Located on N Meridian Street with limited weekday hours.
description_long: Elliott Dock operates as a pawn shop in Indianapolis, Indiana, serving the local community through collateral-based lending and merchandise transactions. The business is situated at 2464 N Meridian Street in the 46208 zip code area, a central Indianapolis location. Pawn shops like Elliott Dock have been part of consumer finance for centuries, providing quick access to cash by accepting personal items of value as collateral. Elliott Dock follows this traditional model in the Indianapolis market. The company offers pawn services typical to the industry: customers can bring items of value and receive immediate cash loans secured by those items. The business operates with consistent weekday hours, open Monday through Wednesday from 10 AM to 5 PM, though the website data shows limited hours information beyond midweek. This suggests a smaller operation compared to larger pawn chains. Elliott Dock's distinguishing factor is its local, independent status as a neighborhood pawn shop rather than part of a national chain. The business maintains a direct phone line (+1 317-926-6006) for customer inquiries and accepts walk-in transactions during posted hours. However, Elliott Dock has limited online presence and visibility based on the FindAPawnShop.com listing. The company carries a 1-star rating based on a single Google review, which is a significant concern for potential customers evaluating service quality and reliability. This minimal review count makes it difficult to assess consistent service standards. The business appears to operate as a traditional, cash-based pawn operation without evidence of expanded services, digital tools, or customer engagement strategies. For consumers seeking quick cash through collateral loans, Elliott Dock represents a local option, but the lack of substantial customer feedback and limited operational transparency warrant caution.
pros: Conveniently located at 2464 N Meridian Street in central Indianapolis
Accessible by phone at +1 317-926-6006 for customer inquiries
Offers immediate cash loans through collateral-based pawn services
Independent local business rather than corporate chain
Consistent weekday operating hours (10 AM-5 PM Monday-Wednesday)
Accepts walk-in customers during business hours
cons: Only 1 Google review available, making service quality assessment impossible
1-star rating from limited customer feedback raises quality concerns
Incomplete hours information; only Monday-Wednesday listed with no weekend or Thursday-Friday hours shown
Minimal online presence and limited company information available
No evidence of customer service policies, loan terms, or redemption rates published
best_for: Local Indianapolis residents needing immediate cash with collateral items
Customers seeking traditional pawn services in the N Meridian Street area
People with flexible schedules able to visit during limited weekday hours
diagnosis: Elliott Dock is best for Indianapolis residents who need immediate cash and own items of value they're willing to pawn. The critical caveat is the extremely limited customer feedback (1 review, 1-star rating), which makes it impossible to verify service quality, fair pricing, or whether this business is currently operating reliably.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
Cash advances on items of value
